title: DTCC moves tokenized securities into live trading, marking a milestone for Wall Street's blockchain push
summary: DTCC's first live production trades using tokenized securities show how blockchain could reshape the infrastructure behind Wall Street.

title: Cantor and Securitize collaborate on blockchain-based IPOs
summary: The move creates a pathway for public companies to raise capital onchain and issue tokenized securities.

title: Ostium suffers $18 million exploit as oracle attack wave continues to hit DeFi
summary: A hacker used Ostium's own price-reporting infrastructure against the protocol, submitting falsified future-dated oracle data to manufacture fake trading profits and trigger an $18 million payout.

title: The privacy paradox of protecting kids online
summary: We don’t need to imagine the privacy pitfalls of age verification. They’ve been happening for years, argues Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard.

title: Crypto Long & Short: To ETH or not to ETH — is SOL the better diversifier?
summary: In this week's, Morgan Stanley’s Denny Galindo writes that as the crypto market expands, solana has historically been a better portfolio diversifier than ether, despite being more volatile.
